backlog.title: Hide database credentials trong logs
backlog.approach:
1. _mask_dsn(dsn): re.sub pattern 'postgresql://(.*?):(.*?)@' → 'postgresql://\1:***@'
2. Apply trước khi log trong db.py và dependencies.py
acceptance_criteria: DSN trong log bị mask password

backlog.title: Database connection security (TLS + retry)
backlog.description: src/backend/db.py: thiếu TLS support và retry logic.
backlog.approach:
1. ORION_DB_SSL=1 → sslmode=require vào connection string
2. Retry: tenacity @retry(stop=stop_after_attempt(3), wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=10))
3. Chỉ retry connection failures, không query errors

backlog.title: Cải thiện logging (file rotation + structured JSON)
backlog.description: Logger hiện tại ghi file không rotation.
backlog.approach:
1. RotatingFileHandler: maxBytes=10MB, backupCount=5
2. ORION_LOG_FORMAT=json → JSONFormatter thay text
3. JSON: timestamp, level, logger, message, module, funcName, lineno
4. Console handler giữ text format

backlog.title: Configure CI: security regression tests (CVE fail)
backlog.description: CI cần fail nếu CVE critical/high.
backlog.approach:
1. safety check: `safety check --fail-on=high`
2. pip-audit: `pip-audit --fail-on=high`
3. Nếu bandit/safety/pip-audit tìm issue → CI fail
acceptance_criteria: CI fail nếu có CVE critical
tasks: Thêm fail condition trong security job

backlog.title: Documentation consistency review
backlog.description: Review toàn bộ docs/ để đảm bảo consistency, không broken links, no duplicates.
backlog.approach:
1. Map tất cả docs: find docs/ -name '*.md'
2. Check terminology: 'deterministic' vs 'evidence' vs 'assessment', thống nhất
3. Broken links: grep '](...)' trong all .md, kiểm tra file tồn tại
4. Duplicate sections: merge nếu trùng
5. Fix tất cả issues

backlog.title: DevOps documentation (Docker + CI)
backlog.description: Hướng dẫn Docker build/run, CI pipeline structure.
backlog.approach:
1. docs/devops/docker.md: docker-compose up, services, volumes, troubleshooting
2. docs/devops/ci.md: GitHub Actions pipeline, jobs, stages
3. Code blocks copy-paste được

backlog.title: Performance benchmarks (pipeline execution time)
backlog.approach:
1. tests/benchmark/test_pipeline_performance.py dùng pytest-benchmark
2. Cases: 1 target/1 cap, 5 targets/10 caps, 20 targets/50 caps
3. warmup 1, measure 5, report min/avg/max

backlog.title: Memory leak tests
backlog.approach:
1. Dùng tracemalloc hoặc psutil đo memory
2. Run pipeline 100 lần (mock), đo sau mỗi 10 iterations
3. Fail nếu memory tăng > 10%
acceptance_criteria: Memory leak test script chạy được
tasks: Tích hợp vào CI nếu feasible

backlog.title: Tool documentation (usage examples)
backlog.description: Document từng tool với curl examples.
backlog.approach:
1. docs/tools/: linux.md, grafana.md, zabbix.md, internet.md, knowledge-base.md
2. Mỗi file: overview, capabilities list, curl example, Python example, expected output
acceptance_criteria: Có curl example cho mỗi tool

backlog.title: API documentation (endpoints + examples)
backlog.description: Tất cả API endpoints với curl examples.
backlog.approach:
1. docs/api/: mỗi endpoint 1 section:
   - Method + Path, Headers, Request body, Response, Errors
2. Endpoints: /api/query, /api/health, /api/status, /api/sessions, /api/knowledge, /api/documents, /api/metrics
3. Tất cả curl commands copy-paste được
